schema.description: Honest scope overflow tracking (cheap-agent-fleet.mdc rule #5). Long-tail items that overflow the 48-hour blitz become Brain's first L5 self-prioritized workstreams in Phase H. NEVER silently dropped — every entry must be visible to founder and become a candidate for Phase H decomposition.

entry.title: str
